name: AuditLog.Read.All
description: Read audit log activities without a signed-in user. Verification: confirm sign-in / token churn (AADSTS) has quieted after remediation.

name: Device.Read.All
description: Read the organization's device objects without a signed-in user. Used to locate <TARGET-DEVICE-NAME> (and other front-desk PCs) to add to the FrontDesk-SharedPCs group.

name: DeviceManagementConfiguration.ReadWrite.All
description: Read and write Intune device configuration and endpoint security policies without a signed-in user. Step 1: create/assign the Account protection policy that disables WHFB. Step 4: create/assign the Custom OMA-URI profile for security-key sign-in.

name: DeviceManagementManagedDevices.PrivilegedOperations.All
description: Perform privileged operations on Intune managed devices without a signed-in user. Used to trigger a device sync so the WHFB-disable policy applies before the container reset (Step 1 note).

name: DeviceManagementManagedDevices.Read.All
description: Read properties of Intune-managed devices without a signed-in user. Used to resolve the managed-device record for <TARGET-DEVICE-NAME> and confirm policy assignment state.

name: Directory.Read.All
description: Read directory data (users, groups, apps) without a signed-in user. General resolution support for the remediation and verification steps.

name: Group.ReadWrite.All
description: Read and write all groups without a signed-in user. Step 1: create the FrontDesk-SharedPCs device group and add the front-desk PCs as members.

name: Policy.Read.All
description: Read all organization policies without a signed-in user. Verification: confirm the authentication methods policy reflects the FIDO2/passkey enablement.

name: Policy.ReadWrite.AuthenticationMethod
description: Read and write the Entra authentication methods policy without a signed-in user. Step 3: enable the Passkey (FIDO2) authentication method and configure self-service registration.

name: User.Read.All
description: Read user profiles without a signed-in user. Used to resolve the affected staff accounts (affected staff) for targeting and verification.

name: UserAuthenticationMethod.Read.All
description: Read users' authentication methods without a signed-in user. Verification (Step 5): confirm each staff member has registered their primary and backup YubiKey.

name: DeviceManagementScripts.ReadWrite.All
description: Allows the app to read and write Microsoft Intune device compliance scripts, device management scripts, device shell scripts, device custom attribute shell scripts and device health scripts, without a signed-in user.
